title: 6 June Buffett Dividend Dog Buys And 4 To Watch
text: This Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first appeared 5/20/23 on line. YCharts and Dogs of The Dow both track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from 6/20/23 YCharts data. 32 of 48 current Berkshire-Hathaway-owned-stocks pay dividends. As of 6/20/23 the top-ten ranged 3.00%-8.81% by annual-yield and 46 of 48 ranged -2.10% to 50.32% per broker-estimated target-price-upsides. Analyst-augured top-ten net-gains from Buffett's June dividend dogs ranged 17.99%-33.66% from GL, CE, ALLY, C, OXY, CVX, BAC, PARA, GM, and top pick KHC per YCharts data.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Globe Life (GL) in Your Portfolio
text: Globe Life's (GL) strong segmental performance, improving net investment income and positive 2023 outlook poise it well for growth.

title: 2 Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist and 1 to Avoid
text: These two Buffett buys managed to build wide competitive moats. The one to avoid is solid, but there are better options out there.
